entry.lex: Vanuatu, a UNESCO member with its capital in Port Vila and headed by government leader Charlot Salwai, is characterized by its linguistic diversity, including languages such as Letemboi, Litzlitz, and Port Sandwich.

The Arab Kingdom of Syria | located_in | Asia
The Arab Kingdom of Syria | has_capital | Damascus
The Arab Kingdom of Syria | headed_by | Faisal I of Iraq
The Arab Kingdom of Syria | has_language | Arabic
The Arab Kingdom of Syria | followed_by | Occupied Enemy Territory Administration

entry.lex: The Arab Kingdom of Syria was a historical constitutional monarchy in Asia, headquartered in Damascus with Faisal I of Iraq as head of state. It replaced the Occupied Enemy Territory Administration and had Arabic as its official language.

originaltripleset.otriple: The Vermont Republic | is_a | proto-state
The Vermont Republic | has_capital | Windsor
The Vermont Republic | has_language | English
The Vermont Republic | is_member_of | American Revolutionary War
The Vermont Republic | followed_by | Vermont

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: The Vermont Republic | is_a | proto-state
The Vermont Republic | has_capital | Windsor
The Vermont Republic | has_language | English
The Vermont Republic | is_member_of | American Revolutionary War
The Vermont Republic | followed_by | Vermont

entry.lex: The Vermont Republic was a proto-state with its capital in Windsor and English as its official language. A participant in the American Revolutionary War, it replaced the provinces of New Hampshire and New York before eventually being succeeded by Vermont.

entry.lex: Malawi is a member of the African Union, the World Trade Organization, and the ICSID. It is led by the President of Malawi, features the Shire River as its lowest point, and is characterized by the Nyakyusa and Nyika languages.

entry.lex: Theo Vondano was a German politician and member of the Christian Democratic Union who served as a Member of the Landtag of Rhineland-Palatinate in Mainz. Born and deceased in Kaiserslautern, he was awarded the Cross of the Order of Merit of the Federal Republic of Germany.

originaltripleset.otriple: Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | is_a | sovereign historical country
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_capital | Belgrade
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | is_a | monarchy
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | headed_by | Peter II
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | headed_by | Josip Broz Tito
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_currency | Yugoslav dinar
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_language | Serbo-Croatian
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_legislative_body | Anti-Fascist Council of the People's Liberation of Yugoslavia
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | shares_border_with | Democratic Government of Albania

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | is_a | sovereign historical country
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_capital | Belgrade
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | is_a | monarchy
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | headed_by | Peter II
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | headed_by | Josip Broz Tito
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_currency | Yugoslav dinar
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_language | Serbo-Croatian
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | has_legislative_body | Anti-Fascist Council of the People's Liberation of Yugoslavia
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | shares_border_with | Democratic Government of Albania

entry.lex: Democratic Federal Yugoslavia was a sovereign historical country with its capital in Belgrade. It was a monarchy headed by state leader Peter II and government leader Josip Broz Tito, utilizing the Yugoslav dinar as currency and Serbo-Croatian as the official language. Its legislative body was the Anti-Fascist Council of the People's Liberation of Yugoslavia, and it shared a border with the Democratic Government of Albania.

Sint Eustatius | is_part_of | The Netherlands Antilles

entry.lex: The Netherlands Antilles was a historical constitutional monarchy in the Caribbean and a country within the Kingdom of the Netherlands, with Papiamento as its official language and Sint Eustatius as an administrative entity.

The Kingdom of the Lombards | has_language | Latin
The Kingdom of the Lombards | has_language | Vulgar Latin
The Kingdom of the Lombards | has_currency | Tremissis

entry.lex: The Kingdom of the Lombards was a historical European kingdom with its capital in Pavia, governed as an elective monarchy. It utilized Latin as its official language, Vulgar Latin for general use, and the Tremissis as its currency.

entry.lex: Francia, described by the Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary, replaced Germania Secunda. It was a Christian state of the Catholic Church with Frankish as its official language and Latin in use, with Aachen and Tournai serving as capitals.
